title: olotrema washingtoniana
intro: Olotrema washingtoniana is a type of plant, specifically a species of fungus, that belongs to the family Myxomycetes. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Olotrema washingtoniana are said to include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Olotrema washingtoniana include tinctures, infusions, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
